title: Normal Girlfriend vs INFJ Girlfriend
text: oh my gosh let's get coffee I'll have a grande Cinnamon Dolce Latte soy milk extra pump of syrup blonde roast espresso don't make me repeat it I'll have a black coffee my seventh of the day oh my gosh let's take a look in that cute antique store right there I love looking at old stuff I just can't stop thinking about how everyone who originally bought this stuff is dead really you didn't even notice I got my eyebrows done I didn't even realize I had a unibrow coming in I'm fine I'm pretty upset with you but it probably has more to do with me so I'll just work it out in therapy next Tuesday how could you forget that today is the seven month anniversary of our first kiss do you even care about us what day of the week is it is it Tuesday it's Friday what do you think I should wear to your aunt Hilda's birthday party the pink or the cheetah it turns out all of my clothes are navy blue oh my gosh Tiffany's boyfriend finally proposed look at the size of that diamond yeah I give it three months oh my Instagram friend Steven uh he's nobody don't worry about him he's just a friend from an ambiguous time and place so Steven is an acquaintance from high school who really irritates me but I don't have the heart to just cut him off because he lost his arm in a shark attack so I've been stuck in this draining text conversation with him for the last 10 years oopsie I didn't see that stale red light oh I'm sorry I missed the turn because I was uh distracted I was thinking about stoicism I don't want advice from you okay I just want you to listen to me vent about my dead end job at my toxic workplace and how I keep doing the same things over and over again expecting different results okay I don't need to listen to you to know exactly what you're feeling so now here's what you should do I know just the thing for us to watch a new True Crime documentary about a woman who gets killed by her psycho boyfriend I only have the emotional capacity to watch the Great British Bake Off for the third time and we're gonna have to skip over the elimination Parts I just can't handle it I am going on a diet right after I eat this entire pepperoni pizza I'm gonna go on a social media diet right after I scroll Instagram for three hours

title: Normal Girlfriend vs INFJ Girlfriend
text: third time and we're gonna have to skip over the elimination Parts I just can't handle it I am going on a diet right after I eat this entire pepperoni pizza I'm gonna go on a social media diet right after I scroll Instagram for three hours and become hopelessly depressed ah why are men like this clearly I ended up in a relationship with someone who has the exact same personality traits as my dad and while that is Icky I can't say it's surprising [Music] Mr Frank James [Music]
